{{Infobox concept
| name = Valinhall powers
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valinhall powers]] exist that can provide warmth.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valinhall]] has its own source of power/energy.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] uses an unorthodox application of a lesser-known [[Valinhall]] power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]] lacks [[Valinhall powers]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
